'''ân-p-b''' ('''kanapab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:prearm|prearm]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-p-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:prearm|prearm]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-p-b
|-
! Lemma
| kanapab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinapab|thinapab]] || [[word:jinapab|jinapab]] || [[word:shinapab|shinapab]] || [[word:kinapab|kinapab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunapab|thuthunapab]] || [[word:jujunapab|jujunapab]] || [[word:shushunapab|shushunapab]] || [[word:kukunapab|kukunapab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunapab|thunapab]] || [[word:junapab|junapab]] || [[word:shunapab|shunapab]] || [[word:kunapab|kunapab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunapab|thunapab]] || [[word:junapab|junapab]] || [[word:shunapab|shunapab]] || [[word:kunapab|kunapab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenapab|thenapab]] || [[word:jenapab|jenapab]] || [[word:shenapab|shenapab]] || [[word:kenapab|kenapab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonapab|thothonapab]] || [[word:jojonapab|jojonapab]] || [[word:shoshonapab|shoshonapab]] || [[word:kokonapab|kokonapab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonapab|thonapab]] || [[word:jonapab|jonapab]] || [[word:shonapab|shonapab]] || [[word:konapab|konapab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonapab|thonapab]] || [[word:jonapab|jonapab]] || [[word:shonapab|shonapab]] || [[word:konapab|konapab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŚnapab|thĂŚnapab]] || [[word:jĂŚnapab|jĂŚnapab]] || [[word:shĂŚnapab|shĂŚnapab]] || [[word:kĂŚnapab|kĂŚnapab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanapab|thathanapab]] || [[word:jajanapab|jajanapab]] || [[word:shashanapab|shashanapab]] || [[word:kakanapab|kakanapab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanapab|thanapab]] || [[word:janapab|janapab]] || [[word:shanapab|shanapab]] || [[word:kanapab|kanapab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanapab|thanapab]] || [[word:janapab|janapab]] || [[word:shanapab|shanapab]] || [[word:kanapab|kanapab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanapab|shanapab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanapab|goshanapab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanapab|gokishanapab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanapabnĂź|shanapabnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanapabnknĂź|goshanapabnknĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanapabnĂź|gokishanapabnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanapabshĂŤ|shanapabshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanapabnkshĂŤ|goshanapabnkshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanapabshĂŤ|gokishanapabshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanapabro|shanapabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanapabnkro|goshanapabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanapabro|gokishanapabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanapabmu|shanapabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanapabnkmu|goshanapabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanapabmu|gokishanapabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanapabsher|shanapabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanapabnksher|goshanapabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanapabsher|gokishanapabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanapabng|shanapabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanapabnkng|goshanapabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanapabng|gokishanapabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanapabya|shanapabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanapabnkya|goshanapabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanapabya|gokishanapabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanapabyam|shanapabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanapabnkyam|goshanapabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanapabyam|gokishanapabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanapabnĂźshĂŤ|shanapabnĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanapabnknĂźshĂŤ|goshanapabnknĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanapabnĂźshĂŤ|gokishanapabnĂźshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanapabnĂźro|shanapabnĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanapabnknĂźro|goshanapabnknĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanapabnĂźro|gokishanapabnĂźro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanapabnĂźmu|shanapabnĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanapabnknĂźmu|goshanapabnknĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanapabnĂźmu|gokishanapabnĂźmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanapabshĂŤnĂź|shanapabshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanapabnkshĂŤnĂź|goshanapabnkshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanapabshĂŤnĂź|gokishanapabshĂŤnĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanapabshĂŤro|shanapabshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanapabnkshĂŤro|goshanapabnkshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanapabshĂŤro|gokishanapabshĂŤro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanapabshĂŤmu|shanapabshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanapabnkshĂŤmu|goshanapabnkshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanapabshĂŤmu|gokishanapabshĂŤmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanapabronĂź|shanapabronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanapabnkronĂź|goshanapabnkronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanapabronĂź|gokishanapabronĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanapabroshĂŤ|shanapabroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanapabnkroshĂŤ|goshanapabnkroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanapabroshĂŤ|gokishanapabroshĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanapabromu|shanapabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanapabnkromu|goshanapabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanapabromu|gokishanapabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanapabmunĂź|shanapabmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanapabnkmunĂź|goshanapabnkmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanapabmunĂź|gokishanapabmunĂź]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanapabmushĂŤ|shanapabmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanapabnkmushĂŤ|goshanapabnkmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanapabmushĂŤ|gokishanapabmushĂŤ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanapabmuro|shanapabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanapabnkmuro|goshanapabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanapabmuro|gokishanapabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5445898}}
